nodes.source_file: docs/architecture/frd/Module 03: Lead & Inquiry Management/Part 5 – API Contracts.md

nodes.label: 2.1 Ingest Inquiry (`POST /api/v1/crm/inquiries`)
nodes.source_file: docs/architecture/frd/Module 03: Lead & Inquiry Management/Part 5 – API Contracts.md

nodes.label: 2.2 Qualify Inquiry (`POST /api/v1/crm/inquiries/{id}/qualify`)
nodes.source_file: docs/architecture/frd/Module 03: Lead & Inquiry Management/Part 5 – API Contracts.md

nodes.label: 2.3 Transition Lead Stage (`PATCH /api/v1/crm/leads/{id}/stage`)
nodes.source_file: docs/architecture/frd/Module 03: Lead & Inquiry Management/Part 5 – API Contracts.md

nodes.label: 2.4 Schedule Follow-up (`POST /api/v1/crm/leads/{id}/follow-ups`)
nodes.source_file: docs/architecture/frd/Module 03: Lead & Inquiry Management/Part 5 – API Contracts.md

nodes.label: 2.5 Log Follow-up Outcome (`PATCH /api/v1/crm/leads/follow-ups/{id}`)
nodes.source_file: docs/architecture/frd/Module 03: Lead & Inquiry Management/Part 5 – API Contracts.md

nodes.label: 2.6 Close Lead as Lost (`POST /api/v1/crm/leads/{id}/lost`)
nodes.source_file: docs/architecture/frd/Module 03: Lead & Inquiry Management/Part 5 – API Contracts.md

nodes.label: 2.7 Convert Lead to Admission (`POST /api/v1/crm/leads/{id}/convert`)
nodes.source_file: docs/architecture/frd/Module 03: Lead & Inquiry Management/Part 5 – API Contracts.md

nodes.label: 2.8 List Inquiries (`GET /api/v1/crm/inquiries`)

nodes.label: 2.11 Get Lead Details (`GET /api/v1/crm/leads/{id}`)
